review_history.summary: The overnight unresolved-state fixture makes checkpoint necessity unambiguous and covers delegation, reset timing, validation honesty, closeout, and notification authority.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: all checkpoint fields and explicit unknown handling are required
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: fresh bounded packets, ownership, output shape, verification, ceilings, and exceptions are covered
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass: actual-status inspection and unrun-validator separation prevent false integration claims
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: compact/clear/resume and pre-reset refresh logic are tested
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: Telegram and stronger authority/claim boundaries are explicit
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: raw/private/secret, runtime-path, golden, and fabricated execution risks are gated

no_golden_finding: pass: the fixture supplies only synthetic forward state and the criteria require semantic compliance.
residual_gaps: No compact, clear, resume, subagent delegation, validator, or notification mechanism was executed.
